data.content:
Now I have the full picture. Let me create the `Directory.Packages.props` and strip versions from all projects.

**Conflicts resolved (highest wins):**
- `System.Text.Json`: 10.0.1 (over 8.0.4)
- `Azure.Identity`: 1.13.2 (over 1.11.4)

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersions>true</ManagePackageVersions>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have the full picture. Let me gather all packages and their versions:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---------|-----|--------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I've identified the highest version for each package across all projects, so now I need to create a central package management file at the solution root that pins these versions and enables centralized version control.

Next, I'll need to strip out the individual version attributes from every package reference across all the project files so they inherit from the central configuration instead.

    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

Done. Here's a summary of the conversion:

**Created** `Directory.Packages.props` with 5 centralized package versions:
| Package | Version | Conflict? |
|---|---|---|
| `Azure.Identity` | **1.13.2** | ✅ 1.13.2 > 1.11.4 |
| `System.Text.Json` | **10.0.1** | ✅ 10.0.1 > 8.0.4 |
| `Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting` | 8.0.1 | — |
| `OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting` | 1.15.0 | — |
| `xunit` | 2.9.3 | — |

**Updated** all 4 `.csproj` files — removed `Version` attributes from every `<PackageReference>`.
